title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: Most likely: [`fugue_calculate_baseline_trio_policy` in `scripts/lib/shadow-continuity-policy.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/shadow-continuity-policy.sh#L230). Why: it computes `claude` baseline success strictly from `provider=="claude"` at [`#L199`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/shadow-continuity-policy.sh#L199), so a `claude-main-orchestrator` artifact that ended up as `provider=gemini` is still treated as missing `claude`; then recovery only passes if `codex` is present **and** there are at least 2 distinct non-codex successful families (`FUGUE_EFFECTIVE_NON_CODEX_SUCCESS_COUNT >= 2`) at [`#L230`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/shadow-continuity-policy.sh#L230). If that second non-codex family is absent, `baseline_trio_gate` remains `fail`.
